title: Cryptool gets verified on X
content_html:
Cryptool's X account has been awarded the verified badge.

The verification confirms @cryptool_io as the authentic, official Cryptool account. The team only ever communicates through the official channels: the verified X account, the official Telegram group, and email addresses on the cryptool.io domain.

If anyone reaches out claiming to be from the Cryptool team from a different handle or domain, treat it as a scam and report it.
author: Cryptool
